title: Photosensitizer-conjugated gold nanorods for enzyme-activatable fluorescence imaging and photodynamic therapy.
author: Jang B Choi Y
content: S-EPMC3287428 PMC3287428 Photosensitizer-conjugated gold nanorods for enzyme-activatable fluorescence imaging and photodynamic therapy. We report on the development of photosensitizer-conjugated gold nanorods (MMP2P-GNR) in which photosensitizers were conjugated onto the surface of gold nanorods
